title: [ExportVerilog] Verilog empty struct emission
body:
```mlir
hw.module @EmptyStruct(%empty: !hw.struct<>) {
}
```
will generate
```verilog
module EmptyStruct(     // foo.mlir:1:1
  input struct packed {} empty);

endmodule
```
An empty `{}` causes syntax errors so we need to emit `/*Zero Width*/` instead.
